message:
fix(web/overlays): improve analysis overlay caching, error handling, and cleanup

## EnvironmentalProvenanceOverlay.tsx
- Add proper cache invalidation when switching between phages: previously
  the analysis result was cached but would display stale data when the
  user navigated to a different phage while the overlay was open
- Introduce `lastAnalyzedKeyRef` to track which phage was last analyzed,
  triggering re-analysis when the phage ID changes
- Add proper error state handling with `setError()` and display error
  message to user instead of silently failing
- Fix dependency array: use extracted `overlayIsOpen` boolean instead of
  the `isOpen` function reference to prevent unnecessary re-runs
- Remove unused `repository` prop from component interface
- Remove unused imports: `useMemo` from React, `usePhageStore` from state,
  and `BiomeType` from core

## NicheNetworkOverlay.tsx
- Remove unused type imports `CoOccurrenceNetwork` and `NicheProfile`
  from @phage-explorer/core that were generating TypeScript warnings

## PhylodynamicsOverlay.tsx
- Remove unused import (specific import not visible in diff but follows
  the same pattern of cleaning up unused type imports)

These changes improve the reliability of the environmental analysis
overlays and clean up the codebase by removing dead imports that were
accumulating as the component APIs evolved.
